title: Live Updates: Britain’s Starmer Says He Will Not Resign
summary_full: Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to continue in office as he met with cabinet members. Dozens of Labour Party lawmakers had urged him to step down after heavy losses in local elections.
summary_public: Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to continue in office as he met with cabinet members. Dozens of Labour Party lawmakers had urged him to step down after heavy losses in local elections.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to continue in office
